text: Daddy, let's play. Hey, are you gonna play an acorn? Yeah! This is a cycle. You should I play the acorn. Maybe I'll put it next to this lamp. Behind this garbage cake, you don't know how to play. When I say four, that means you're getting close to the acorn. When I say cold, it means you're far away. And when I clap, that means you're right in the next. Hey, let's practice. Let's all play.
